overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a foggy, gaslit historic city street at night. The character passes by a bank building and an NPC before turning at an intersection in an atmospheric, wet cobblestone environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with bank building

events.description: passes a body lying on the sidewalk to the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the muddy cobblestone street toward the Lemoyne National Bank building

notable_agents.action: body lying motionless on the sidewalk near the bank entrance

entered.detail: two-story brick building with green doors, balcony, and 'BANK' signage
cast iron gas lamp illuminating the foggy street
wet cobblestone road with embedded tram tracks
raised wooden plank walkway along the right side

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a foggy, gaslit historic street at night. The Lemoyne National Bank building dominates the left side while street lamps cast a yellow glow through the mist. At around 8 seconds, the character passes a body lying on the sidewalk near the bank entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic street with wanted posters and storefronts

events.description: passing the bank building into a narrower street section with poster-covered walls

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past buildings with wanted posters on the walls

notable_agents.action: man standing in a doorway next to wanted posters, observing the street

entered.detail: brick wall with multiple yellow wanted posters and advertisements
wooden wagon with large wheels parked on the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: Moving past the bank, the character enters a narrower section of the historic street. A building wall covered in wanted posters appears on the left, where an NPC stands in a doorway. A horse-drawn carriage is parked on the right side of the cobblestone road as the character continues walking through the fog.

events.description: character turns right at the street intersection

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection to face a new street with a lit doorway

entered.detail: building entrance with warm light glowing from within

segments.scene_description: At the intersection, the character turns right, revealing a new view of the historic district. The camera pans to show a building with a warmly lit doorway on the right, while the previous street with the posters and carriage falls out of view behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy, gaslit historic district that shifts from a wide bank-lined street to a narrower alleyway before turning into a new section of the city. It begins by following the character past the imposing Lemoyne National Bank, where yellow street lamps pierce through the mist and a body lies motionless on the sidewalk. As the character moves forward, the environment tightens into a narrower street featuring a wall plastered with wanted posters and a parked horse-drawn carriage on the wet cobblestones. The scene then shifts as the character reaches an intersection and turns right, leaving the posters and carriage behind. Finally, the camera pans to reveal a fresh perspective of the district, centering on a building with a warmly lit doorway.
